verdicts.reason: Committed regression tests in test/canonical-audit-self-contained.test.js (CARS-S-1/S-2/S-3 plus the retained ENOTDIR case covering S-4) pin all four behaviors and pass 20/20 on the current head per /tmp/cars-test-output.txt; the uncommitted scratchpad replay is not needed because the committed suite independently fixes each clause.

The pre-existing test 'canonical audit surfaces an expected review stage replaced by a file' writes an extensionless file named gate and asserts rejection with error.code === 'ENOTDIR'; it still passes on current head (20/20), and gate matches neither the dot-skip, -final.md, nor .json tolerance branches, so the fail-loud throw is preserved by construction.

CARS-S-3 creates a stale .dispatch.lock directory and a .DS_Store file under the review root, promotion completes without error, and the assertion confirms no promoted artifact path includes .dispatch.lock (so it was not treated as a stage); the entry.startsWith('.') continue branch in the diff is the direct mechanism.

The diff adds the exact /^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\.json$/ tolerance branch in safeReaddirDirectories, and CARS-S-2 pins a representative future state file (future_review-state.json, exercising letters/underscore/hyphen) with doesNotReject, passing on current head; no inferential leap from code+test to the clause's pattern-level tolerance.

Committed test CARS-S-1 creates dispatch-authorizations.json under .vibepro/reviews/<story>/ plus a gate stage, and asserts promoteCanonicalAuditArtifacts succeeds AND promotes the gate review_request artifact (stage collection continues); it passes 20/20 on current head per /tmp/cars-test-output.txt, and the diff's dot-skip/json-tolerance in safeReaddirDirectories (src/canonical-audit.js ~2660) reaches both callers (lines 583/1176) used by merge-time promotion.
